parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'rows', json_agg(json_build_object(
    'key', key,
    'days_old', days_old,
    'urgency', urgency,
    'updated_at', updated_at
  ) ORDER BY days_old DESC),
  'any_high', bool_or(urgency = 'high'),
  'any_medium_or_high', bool_or(urgency IN ('medium','high')),
  'count_total', count(*)
) AS report
FROM (
  SELECT
    key,
    updated_at,
    EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - COALESCE(updated_at, NOW()))::int AS days_old,
    CASE
      WHEN updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' THEN 'high'
      WHEN updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '60 days' THEN 'medium'
      ELSE 'ok'
    END AS urgency
  FROM system_config
  WHERE key IN ('webhook_api_key','encryption_key','docusign_webhook_secret','signaturit_webhook_secret')
) x;
SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'architect_email'
